mapper.select: SELECT id, request_type, status, project_id, space_id, iteration_id, work_item_id, workflow_instance_id, workflow_node_instance_id, agent_session_id, runtime_type, runtime_session_id, runtime_event_id, skill_name, mcp_server, mcp_tool, title, content, context_summary, options_json, priority, required_role, assignee_user_id, created_at, updated_at, resolved_by, resolved_at, resolution_comment, resolution_payload_json FROM confirmation_request WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, request_type, status, project_id, space_id, iteration_id, work_item_id, workflow_instance_id, workflow_node_instance_id, agent_session_id, runtime_type, runtime_session_id, runtime_event_id, skill_name, mcp_server, mcp_tool, title, content, context_summary, options_json, priority, required_role, assignee_user_id, created_at, updated_at, resolved_by, resolved_at, resolution_comment, resolution_payload_json FROM confirmation_request WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, request_type, status, project_id, space_id, iteration_id, work_item_id, workflow_instance_id, workflow_node_instance_id, agent_session_id, runtime_type, runtime_session_id, runtime_event_id, skill_name, mcp_server, mcp_tool, title, content, context_summary, options_json, priority, required_role, assignee_user_id, created_at, updated_at, resolved_by, resolved_at, resolution_comment, resolution_payload_json FROM confirmation_request WHERE work_item_id = #{workItemId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO confirmation_request (id, request_type, status, project_id, space_id, iteration_id, work_item_id, workflow_instance_id, workflow_node_instance_id, agent_session_id, runtime_type, runtime_session_id, runtime_event_id, skill_name, mcp_server, mcp_tool, title, content, context_summary, options_json, priority, required_role, assignee_user_id, resolved_by, resolved_at, resolution_comment, resolution_payload_json) VALUES (#{id}, #{requestType}, #{status}, #{projectId}, #{spaceId}, #{iterationId}, #{workItemId}, #{workflowInstanceId}, #{workflowNodeInstanceId}, #{agentSessionId}, #{runtimeType}, #{runtimeSessionId}, #{runtimeEventId}, #{skillName}, #{mcpServer}, #{mcpTool}, #{title}, #{content}, #{contextSummary}, #{optionsJson}, #{priority}, #{requiredRole}, #{assigneeUserId}, #{resolvedBy}, #{resolvedAt}, #{resolutionComment}, #{resolutionPayloadJson})
mapper.update: UPDATE confirmation_request SET status = #{status}, resolved_by = #{resolvedBy}, resolved_at = #{resolvedAt}, resolution_comment = #{resolutionComment}, resolution_payload_json = #{resolutionPayloadJson}, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = #{id}
